3740594.title: Crane Currency

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Manufacturer of cotton based paper products

3740594.description: Manufacturer of cotton based paper products
3740594.extract: Crane Currency supplies central banks with design services, currency papers, and banknote printing services as well as anti-counterfeiting technology to issuing authorities and brand owners. Crane Currency is headquartered in Dalton, Massachusetts. The company was originally named Crane & Co. and is owned by Crane NXT.
